(99.1 [FM](/wiki/FM_broadcasting "FM broadcasting")) is an American radio station broadcasting a [country music](/wiki/Country_music "Country music") format simulcasting [WBFB](/wiki/WBFB "WBFB"). Licensed to [Bar Harbor, Maine](/wiki/Bar_Harbor,_Maine "Bar Harbor, Maine"), United States, the station serves the [Down East](/wiki/Down_East "Down East") Maine area. The station is owned by Blueberry Broadcasting.[[2]](#cite_note-2) Under proper weather conditions, the station's signal can reach both southwestern [New Brunswick](/wiki/New_Brunswick "New Brunswick") and southwestern [Nova Scotia](/wiki/Nova_Scotia "Nova Scotia"), Canada.

["Facility Technical Data for WBFE"](https://enterpriseefiling.fcc.gov/dataentry/public/tv/publicFacilityTechDetails.html?facilityId=62289). *Licensing and Management System*. [Federal Communications Commission](/wiki/Federal_Communications_Commission "Federal Communications Commission").

["WBFE Facility Record"](https://www.fcc.gov/fcc-bin/fmq?call=WBFE). *United States [Federal Communications Commission](/wiki/Federal_Communications_Commission "Federal Communications Commission"), audio division*.

Harbour, Kathy (June 16, 1992). ["New radio station to broadcast country music"](https://news.google.com/newspapers?id=7KdJAAAAIBAJ&sjid=Jg4NAAAAIBAJ&pg=2979%2C83750). *[Bangor Daily News](/wiki/Bangor_Daily_News "Bangor Daily News")*. p. 6 Hancock. Retrieved February 15, 2024.

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Country music radio station in Bar Harbor, Maine

For the former family-oriented division of Warner Bros., see [Warner Bros. Family Entertainment](/wiki/Warner_Bros._Family_Entertainment "Warner Bros. Family Entertainment").

**WBFE** (99.1 [FM](/wiki/FM_broadcasting "FM broadcasting")) is an American radio station broadcasting a [country music](/wiki/Country_music "Country music") format simulcasting [WBFB](/wiki/WBFB "WBFB"). Licensed to [Bar Harbor, Maine](/wiki/Bar_Harbor,_Maine "Bar Harbor, Maine"), United States, the station serves the [Down East](/wiki/Down_East "Down East") Maine area. The station is owned by Blueberry Broadcasting.[[2]](#cite_note-2) Under proper weather conditions, the station's signal can reach both southwestern [New Brunswick](/wiki/New_Brunswick "New Brunswick") and southwestern [Nova Scotia](/wiki/Nova_Scotia "Nova Scotia"), Canada.

## History

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=WBFE&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: History")]

The station was assigned [call sign](/wiki/Call_sign "Call sign") WPRG on March 24, 1988. On May 19, 1992, the station changed its call sign to WLKE;[[3]](#cite_note-fcc-callsigns-3) that June, it signed on.[[4]](#cite_note-bdn-wlkestart-4) As of September 28, 2009, it became part of a three station country network based out of Blueberry's Bangor office, simulcasting [WBFB](/wiki/WBFB "WBFB") and also heard on [WMCM](/wiki/WMCM "WMCM").[[5]](#cite_note-5) On September 23, 2013, the station took its current WBFE call sign.[[3]](#cite_note-fcc-callsigns-3) Prior to September 28, 2009, the station was branded as "Lucky 99.1".

## References

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=WBFE&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: References")]

[Federal Communications Commission](/wiki/Federal_Communications_Commission "Federal Communications Commission").
2. **[^](#cite_ref-2)** ["WBFE Facility Record"](https://www.fcc.gov/fcc-bin/fmq?call=WBFE). *United States [Federal Communications Commission](/wiki/Federal_Communications_Commission "Federal Communications Commission"), audio division*.

4. **[^](#cite_ref-bdn-wlkestart_4-0)** Harbour, Kathy (June 16, 1992). ["New radio station to broadcast country music"](https://news.google.com/newspapers?id=7KdJAAAAIBAJ&sjid=Jg4NAAAAIBAJ&pg=2979%2C83750). *[Bangor Daily News](/wiki/Bangor_Daily_News "Bangor Daily News")*. p. 6 Hancock. Retrieved February 15, 2024.
